description: Swap JWT-only auth for active-credential verification on 7 BM2 API endpoints to revoke access on deactivation
deviation_notes: Also fixed datasets route not in original spec. Auth check pattern changed from if (!claims) to if (claims instanceof Response) because requireActive* functions return SessionClaims | Response, not SessionClaims | null. Fixed duplicate test suites in __tests__/app/api/ alongside __tests__/api/.
